consortium.description_generic: Consortia that use OpenRS DCB can include any combination of public, academic and specialist libraries and collections. <paragraph/>DCB connects libraries across ILS, LMS and Discovery products to handle resource sharing at scale, whether they choose to use the same or a mix of commercial or open source interfaces and central indexes.<paragraph/>

validation.invalid_to_context: The 'toContext' value must be one of 'DCB' or {{code}} for this mapping. Please correct and try again.
validation.invalid_to_context_server: The 'toContext' value must be 'DCB' or a valid agency code. Please correct and try again.
validation.invalid_to_item_type: The 'toValue' for this item type mapping is invalid. Please change it to one of the following: 'CIRC', 'NONCIRC' or 'CIRCAV'.
validation.invalid_to_location: The 'toValue' for this location mapping must be a valid agency code. Please correct and try again.
validation.invalid_to_patron_type: The 'toValue' for this item type mapping is invalid. Please change it to one of the following: 'ADULT', 'CHILD', 'FACULTY', 'GRADUATE', 'NOT_ELIGIBLE', 'PATRON', 'POSTDOC', 'SENIOR', 'STAFF', 'UNDERGRADUATE' or 'YOUNG_ADULT'.

openrs.name: OpenRS

dcb.description: $t(app.dcb) is an $t(openrs.name) product that enables libraries to deliver direct consortial borrowing services to their patrons across a range of LMS and discovery systems. <paragraph/> Developed by <linkComponent>$t(openrs.who.kint_full)</linkComponent>, $t(app.dcb) helps consortia fulfil patrons borrowing requests across their membership faster and cheaper than traditional resource sharing methods.<paragraph/>

openrs.description: $t(openrs.name)  is a resource sharing initiative of the <linkComponent>$t(openrs.who.olf_full)</linkComponent>. <paragraph/>The open source project is reinventing resource sharing to meet the needs of different types of consortia, using open standards and native integration to provide consortia with robust and extended functionality for consortial resource sharing.<paragraph/>

expedited_checkout.option_description: Instantly check out an available item from your library to a patron.
expedited_checkout.description: Welcome to DCB on-site borrowing. Please provide the barcode and the library of the patron you would like to make a request for. <paragraph>Provided that the patron's details are valid and the item exists and is available at your library, DCB will instantly check out this item to the specified patron.</paragraph>

feedback.in_progress: Your on-site borrowing request has been successfully placed and DCB is now attempting to check it out.
feedback.in_progress_explanation: Your on-site borrowing request has been successfully placed and DCB is now attempting to check it out.
feedback.success: Your on-site borrowing request has been checked out successfully and can be tracked in DCB Admin <linkComponent> here </linkComponent>.

steps.checkout_failure: Item checkout is taking too long. Please view the request and use the 'check for updates' option to refresh its status.

steps.checkout_failure_request_only: Item checkout is taking too long. Please return to the requests list and check the request's status from there.

confirmation.admin_required_borrowing: You must have a role of CONSORTIUM_ADMIN or greater to toggle a library's borrowing status.
confirmation.admin_required_supplying: You must have a role of CONSORTIUM_ADMIN or greater to toggle a library's supplying status.
confirmation.edit_review: Review the changes below, then provide the following details to confirm them.
confirmation.para1_enable_borrowing: <bold>{{library}} patrons </bold> will be able to place borrowing requests at other consortium libraries.
confirmation.para1_enable_supplying: Catalogue records for <bold>{{library}}</bold> will become <bold>discoverable</bold> and <bold>requestable</bold> by patrons of other consortium libraries.
confirmation.para1_disable_borrowing: <bold>{{library}} patrons</bold> will no longer be able to place borrowing requests at other consortium libraries.
confirmation.para1_disable_supplying: Catalogue records for <bold>{{library}}</bold> will <bold>not be discoverable</bold> or <bold>requestable</bold> by patrons of other consortium libraries.
confirmation.session_warning: Your session is about to expire

alert.borrowing_disabled: {{library}} patrons are now <bold>not able</bold> to place borrowing requests at other consortium libraries
alert.borrowing_disabled_fail: Borrowing status for {{library}} patrons <bold>could not be disabled</bold>
alert.borrowing_enabled: {{library}} patrons are now <bold>able</bold> to place borrowing requests at other consortium libraries
alert.borrowing_enabled_fail: Borrowing status for {{library}} patrons <bold>could not be enabled</bold>
alert.supplying_disabled: {{library}} is now <bold>not able</bold> to act as a supplying library
alert.supplying_disabled_fail: Supplying status for {{library}} <bold>could not be disabled</bold>
alert.supplying_enabled: {{library}} is now <bold>enabled</bold> to act as a supplying library
alert.supplying_enabled_fail: Supplying status for {{library}} <bold>could not be enabled</bold>
